description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a sleek, minimalist design, upholstered in a dark blue fabric. The sofa features three main seat sections on the longer side and two on the shorter side, all with uniform, rectangular seat and back cushions. The armrests are straight, low-profile, and integrated into the frame, matching the height of the backrest. The legs are thin, black, and metal, positioned at the corners and slightly inset, giving the sofa a floating appearance. The upholstery appears smooth and solid-colored, with no visible decorative stitching or tufting. This piece is well-suited for contemporary urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered patios.
description: A modern, L-shaped sectional sofa in dark blue fabric with straight armrests, uniform cushions, and slim black metal legs. Its minimalist design and solid upholstery make it ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, all seat and back cushions, and both armrests clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shorter section and the straight, low-profile armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the slim, black metal legs.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the sectional layout and the uniformity of the cushions and armrests.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five uniform, rectangular seat cushions and five matching back cushions, all attached and arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile armrests integrated into the frame, matching the backrest height, with a minimalist, unpadded appearance and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slim, black metal legs positioned at the corners and slightly inset, with a simple, exposed, and modern style.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight, medium-height backrest with attached rectangular cushions, matching the seat cushions in size and style, and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark blue fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
